task_description: Batch 1 improvements: Replace slow local LLM (LMStudio) with DeepSeek API for fast generation, add yellow highlight to unfilled dynamic variables, and improve document formatting/neatness to match PLN official contract standards

verification.summary: All 90 tests pass (python3 -m pytest tests/ -v). Review issues addressed: API key redacted from task metadata, .gitignore added for .agents/tasks/, persistent httpx client with lazy init, highlight heuristic to reduce false positives, PromptTooLargeError for overflow protection.
